metadata.title: Setup — GateCtr
metadata.description: Connect your LLM. Set your budget. Up and running in 30 seconds.

panel.headline:
Cut LLM costs
by up to 40%.
panel.tagline:
Swap your endpoint. Keep your keys.
GateCtr controls. You save.

security.label: Your key stays yours
security.sub: AES-256. Never stored in plain text.

errors.csrfInvalid: This request was blocked: the page origin does not match NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL. If you use a tunnel or preview URL, add that base URL to CSRF_EXTRA_ORIGINS in .env.local (see .env.local.example).
errors.finalizeFailed: We couldn’t finish setup. Check your connection and try again. If you use a tunnel or custom URL, set CSRF_EXTRA_ORIGINS in .env to that origin.
errors.csrfHint: If you access the app via a URL different from NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL, add it to CSRF_EXTRA_ORIGINS (see .env.local.example).

provider.title: Connect your first LLM.
provider.subtitle: Your key stays yours.
provider.keyHint: Encrypted with AES-256. Never stored in plain text.
provider.skipWarning: Without a provider key, GateCtr can't route your requests.

budget.title: Set your budget.
budget.subtitle: Blocked before it reaches the LLM.

hardStop.label: Block requests when limit is reached

errors.failed: Failed to save budget. Try again.

projectName.label: Project name
projectName.hint: Groups your LLM calls and usage data.
projectName.hintSub: You can create more projects from the dashboard.
projectName.description: Used to identify this project in your dashboard and API calls.

errors.quotaExceeded: Project limit reached. Upgrade to add more.
errors.failed: Failed to create project. Try again.
